rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, addressing conceptual conflation and citation errors.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged one missing or wrong citation but did not audit all load-bearing citations comprehensively.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marked confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, fulfilling the highest standard.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adhered to scope with only minor drifts.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions were introduced, and harmful patterns were identified.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced but minor edits lacked annotations.
